Article 6: The management team does not consider sustainability risks or adverse effects of investment decisions on sustainability factors in the investment decision making process. Article 8: The management team addresses sustainability risks by integrating ESG criteria (Environment and/or Social and/or Governance) into its investment decision making process. Article 9: The management team follows a strict sustainable investment objective that significantly contributes to the challenges of the ecological transition, and addresses Sustainability Risks through ratings provided by the Management Company’s external ESG data provider. | 2 The summary risk indicator (SRI) is a guide to the level of risk of this product compared to other products. It shows how likely it is that the product will lose money because of movements in the markets or because we are not able to pay you. It scales in a range from 1 (lowest risk) to 7 (highest risk). The lowest category does not mean a risk-free investment. This indicator is not constant and is updated if the risk profile of the fund changes over time. Historical data, such as is used to calculate the risk indicator, may not be a reliable indication of the future risk profile of the Fund. There is no guarantee that the management objectives in terms of risk will actually be met. The risk indicator assumes you keep the product until the end of the recommended holding period. The actual risk can vary ! significantly if you cash in at an early stage and you may get back less.

disclaimer_glossary_matches.text:
ODDO BHF AM is the asset management division of the ODDO BHF Group. It is the common brand of three legally separate asset management companies: ODDO BHF AM SAS (France), ODDO BHF  AM GmbH (Germany) and ODDO BHF  AM Lux (Luxembourg).
This document has been drawn up by ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS/GmbH/Lux (depending on the management company)) for all market communication. Its investor communication is the responsibility of each distributor or advisor. Potential investors should consult an investment advisor before investing in a strategy. Investor's attention is drawn to the fact that all strategies are not authorised in every country. Should they decide to invest, investors are invited to acquaint themselves with the detailed nature of any risks incurred, in particular the risk of capital loss. The value of the investment may vary both upwards and downwards and may not be returned in full. The investment must be made in accordance with investors’ investment objectives, their investment horizon and their capacity to deal with the risk arising from the transaction. ODDO BHF AM SAS cannot be held responsible for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of this document or the information contained in it. This information is provided for indicative purposes and may be modified at any moment without prior notice. Any opinions presented in this document result from our market forecasts on the publication date. They are subject to change according to market conditions and ODDO BHF AM SAS shall not in any case be held contractually liable for them.

extraction_result.text:
October 2025
1 The EU Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR) is a set of EU rules which aim to make the sustainability profile of funds transparent, more comparable and better understood by end investors. Article 6: The management team does not consider sustainability risks or adverse effects of investment decisions on sustainability factors in the investment decision making process. Article 8: The management team addresses sustainability risks by integrating ESG criteria (Environment and/or Social and/or Governance) into its investment decision making process. Article 9: The management team follows a strict sustainable investment objective that significantly contributes to the challenges of the ecological transition, and addresses Sustainability Risks through ratings provided by the Management Company’s external ESG data provider. | 2 The summary risk indicator (SRI) is a guide to the level of risk of this product compared to other products. It shows how likely it is that the product will lose money because of movements in the markets or because we are not able to pay you. It scales in a range from 1 (lowest risk) to 7 (highest risk). The lowest category does not mean a risk-free investment. This indicator is not constant and is updated if the risk profile of the fund changes over time. Historical data, such as is used to calculate the risk indicator, may not be a reliable indication of the future risk profile of the Fund. There is no guarantee that the management objectives in terms of risk will actually be met. The risk indicator assumes you keep the product until the end of the recommended holding period. The actual risk can vary ! significantly if you cash in at an early stage and you may get back less.
Source: ODDO BHF AM | Data as of 31/08/2025
Main Risks : ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF is principally exposed to the following risks: Investment Strategy Risk, Active Management Risk, Quantitative Model Risk, Secondary Market Trading Risk, Concentration Risk. For more details about risks, please refer to page 5 of this document
ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF – October 2025
ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF
An investment solution aiming at investing efficiently in US equities
Launched in
2025
Assets under management  
$ 5M
Characteristics of the fund
Key features
The active ETF offers investors an efficient access to the growth potential of US equities through a disciplined, quantitative strategy built on momentum.
US equity focus: the fund invests mainly in a dynamic universe of US companies from the S&P 500, across sectors and industries
Proprietary quantitative model: the investment process is driven by a smart momentum strategy analysing extensive historical data with to goal to detect stable trends in the market
Disciplined approach: by relying on a rule-based model rather than discretionary judgment, the fund avoids emotional biases and ensures consistency across market cycles
Diversification & risk management: The portfolio construction process involves a strong focus on diversification and risk management by applying various constraints
Cost-Efficiency: Enjoy a cost-effective, actively managed equity solution to achieve long term capital growth
CHARACTERISTICS OF THE FUND
Source: ODDO BHF AM SAS
Active ETFs
WHY ARE THEY APPEALING ?
An active ETF is an exchange-traded fund that is actively managed
A variety of strategies can be placed into the ETF structure to leverage its benefits, not just passive ones
Unlike passive ETFs which track a benchmark index, an active ETF seeks to outperform the benchmark.
WHAT ARE ACTIVE ETFS?
Outperformance POTENTIAL
Risk Management

Integration of ESG

The case for momentum investments

the momentum effect & the investment philosophy behind
Continuation of returns
Stocks that outperformed in the past tend to continue to perform well in the future, creating trends in the market.

A Stock Market “Anomaly”
This so-called momentum effect is academically well researched and persists in various markets and for different time periods.

Behavioral Finance explanations
Trends are caused by irrational investor behaviors like anchoring, overconfidence or herding.

these market trends can be exploited

data: ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF

Exploitation of the momentum effect, a market anomaly based on a profound economical basis

Studies have proved for various time periods that markets move in trends. This market anomaly is called momentum effect and is caused by behavioral biases of market participants. Our proprietary trend-following investment strategy is a diversified approach to invest in different market trends with the objective to capture these trends and generate a long-term outperformance.

Rules-based investment process

Fully quantitative investment approach removing emotion from portfolio decisions. A systematic approach ensures that investments are made consistently and objectively, while also making the strategy transparent and repeatable.

Active Risk Management at the core of the strategy
The quantitative model rates equities based on a smart momentum strategy which involves a strong focus on diversification and risk management by applying various constraints in the portfolio optimization in order to avoid classic pitfalls of momentum investing like trend reversal and concentration risks.

Active ETF Format
A cost-efficient way to benefit from ODDO BHF AM’s long-term experience in quantitative investments in the US market. Stefan Braun and Karsten Seier, the developers of the strategy more than 20 years ago, successfully managed it through the various market cycles and are still managing the portfolio today.
ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF
The investment objective is to achieve long-term capital growth by investing in a portfolio of US equity securities.
Xetra, Euronext Paris and Dublin, SIX
ODDO BHF Asset Management GmbH (sub-delegation from ODDO BHF Asset Management SAS )
T+1 (cash) for subscriptions and T+2 (max T+10) for redemptions

Article 6: The management team does not consider sustainability risks or adverse effects of investment decisions on sustainability factors in the investment decision making process. Article 8: The management team addresses sustainability risks by integrating ESG criteria (Environment and/or Social and/or Governance) into its investment decision making process. Article 9: The management team follows a strict sustainable investment objective that significantly contributes to the challenges of the ecological transition, and addresses Sustainability Risks through ratings provided by the Management Company’s external ESG data provider. | 2 The summary risk indicator (SRI) is a guide to the level of risk of this product compared to other products. It shows how likely it is that the product will lose money because of movements in the markets or because we are not able to pay you. It scales in a range from 1 (lowest risk) to 7 (highest risk). The lowest category does not mean a risk-free investment. This indicator is not constant and is updated if the risk profile of the fund changes over time. Historical data, such as is used to calculate the risk indicator, may not be a reliable indication of the future risk profile of the Fund. There is no guarantee that the management objectives in terms of risk will actually be met. The risk indicator assumes you keep the product until the end of the recommended holding period. The actual risk can vary ! significantly if you cash in at an early stage and you may get back less.
Source: ODDO BHF AM | Data as of

table_sources.raw_note:
ODDO BHF AM is the asset management division of the ODDO BHF Group. It is the common brand of three legally separate asset management companies: ODDO BHF AM SAS (France), ODDO BHF  AM GmbH (Germany) and ODDO BHF  AM Lux (Luxembourg).
This document has been drawn up by ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS. for market communication. Its communication to any investor is the exclusive responsibility of each distributor or advisor with the exception of Belgium, where this document is intended exclusively for distributors and may not be distributed to non-professional clients.
Potential investors should consult an investment advisor before subscribing to the fund. The investor is informed that the fund presents a risk of capital loss, but also many risks linked to the financial instruments/strategies in the portfolio. In case of subscription, investors must read the Key Information Document (KID) and the fund’s prospectus in order to acquaint themselves with the detailed nature of any risks incurred and all costs. The value of the investment may vary both upwards and downwards and may not be returned in full. The investment must be made in accordance with investors’ investment objectives, their investment horizon and their capacity to deal with the risk arising from the transaction. ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS cannot be held responsible for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of this document or the information contained in it. This information is provided for indicative purposes and may be modified at any moment without prior notice. 
Any opinions presented in this document result from our market forecasts on the publication date. They are subject to change according to market conditions and ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS shall not in any case be held contractually liable for them. The net asset values presented in this document are provided for indicative purposes only. Only the net asset value marked on the transaction statement and the securities account statement is authoritative. Subscriptions and redemptions of mutual funds are processed at an unknown asset value.
A summary of investor rights is available free of charge in electronic form in English language on the website at :
https://am.oddo-bhf.com/FRANCE/en/non_professional_investor/infos_reglementaire
The fund may have been authorized for distribution in different EU member states. Investors are advised to the fact that the management company may decide to withdraw with the arrangements it has made for the distribution of the units of the fund in accordance with Article 93a of Directive 2009/65/EC and Article 32a of Directive 2011/61/EU.
The complaints handling policy is available on our website am.oddo-bhf.com in the regulatory information section. Customer complaints can be addressed in the first instance to the following e-mail address: service_client@oddo-bhf.com (or directly to the Consumer Mediation Service: http://mediationconsommateur.be (ONLY FOR BELGIUM)).
The Key Information Document (FR, ENG, GER) and the prospectus (FR, ENG, GER) are available free of charge from ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS or at am.oddo-bhf.com or at authorized distributors. The annual and interim reports are available free of charge from ODDO BHF ASSET MANAGEMENT SAS or on its internet site am.oddo-bhf.com.
The fund is licensed for sale in Switzerland. The Key Information Document, the prospectus, the annual and interim reports for Switzerland can be obtained free of charge from the Swiss Representative and paying agent, RBC INVESTOR SERVICES BANK, succursale de Zürich, Bleicherweg 7, 8027 Zürich.

title_information.management_company: ODDO BHF AM | Data as of 31/08/2025 Main Risks : ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF is principally exposed to the following risks: Investment Strategy Risk, Active Management Risk, Quantitative Model Risk, Secondary Market Trading Risk, Concentration Risk. For more details about risks, please refer to page 5 of this document ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF – October 2025 ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF An investment solution aiming at investing efficiently in US equities Launched in 2025 Assets under management $ 5M Characteristics of the fund Key features The active ETF offers investors an efficient access to the growth potential of US equities through a disciplined, quantitative strategy built on momentum. US equity focus: the fund invests mainly in a dynamic universe of US companies from the S&P 500, across sectors and industries Proprietary quantitative model: the investment process is driven by a smart momentum strategy analysing extensive historical data with to goal to detect stable trends in the market Disciplined approach: by relying on a rule-based model rather than discretionary judgment, the fund avoids emotional biases and ensures consistency across market cycles Diversification & risk management: The portfolio construction process involves a strong focus on diversification and risk management by applying various constraints Cost-Efficiency: Enjoy a cost-effective, actively managed equity solution to achieve long term capital growth CHARACTERISTICS OF THE FUND

esg_mentions.context: The EU Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR) is a set of EU rules which aim to make the sustainability profile of funds transparent, more comparable and better understood by end investors.
Article 6: The management team does not consider sustainability risks or adverse effects of investment decisions on sustainability factors in the investment decision making process.
Article 8: The management team addresses sustainability risks by integrating ESG criteria (Environment and/or Social and/or Governance) into its investment decision making process.

Article 9: The management team follows a strict sustainable investment objective that significantly contributes to the challenges of the ecological transition, and addresses Sustainability Risks through ratings provided by the Management Company’s external ESG data provider.

ODDO BHF US Equity Active UCITS ETF is exposed to the following risks: : Investment Strategy Risk, Active Management Risk, Quantitative Model Risk, Secondary Market Trading Risk, Concentration Risk, Emerging Markets Risk, Currency Risk, ETF Class and Non-ETF Class Risk, Environmental, Social and Governance Standards, SFDR Sub-Fund Classification Risk, Screening Risk, Liquidity of Investments, Small- and Mid-Capitalisation Risk, Political and/or Legal/Regulatory Risk, Regulatory Restrictions, and Issuer-specific Risk

An active ETF is an exchange-traded fund that is actively managed A variety of strategies can be placed into the ETF structure to leverage its benefits, not just passive ones Unlike passive ETFs which track a benchmark index, an active ETF seeks to outperform the benchmark.

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Opinion' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Opinion disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'Opinions given in this document reflect our market forecasts at the time of the document’s publicati...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Performance' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'Past performance is not a reliable indication of future return and is not constant over time...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'ESG Risk' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory ESG Risk disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'The use of ESG criteria may affect the Fund's performance and therefore the Fund's performance may d...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Issuers mentioned' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Issuers mentioned disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'This does not constitute an investment recommandation...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Back-tested performance' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Back-tested performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The figures refer to simulations of past performances.  These simulations are the result of estimate...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Simulations  of  future performance' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Simulations  of  future performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The simulation presented does not constitute a forecast of the future performance of your investment...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'YtM/YtW usage' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory YtM/YtW usage disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: '• The Yield to Maturity (YtM) is the estimation at a certain date of the expected rate of return of ...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: '* Source: FWW Fundservices GmbH. Please take note of the information given at: http://fww.de/disclai...'
compliance_issues.rule_reference: Rule - Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars Disclaimer

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'If ODDO BHF  Asset Management GmbH receives any rebates on the management fee of target funds or oth...'
compliance_issues.rule_reference: Rule - Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market Disclaimer

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information for performance  information dedicated to German professional clients' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Additional Information for performance  information dedicated to German professional clients disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The European Directive 2014/65/EU (the so-called "MiFID II Directive") extends the scope of provisio...'

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'Although ODDO BHF Asset Management and its information providers, including without limitation, MSCI...'
compliance_issues.rule_reference: Rule - Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used Disclaimer

compliance_issues.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland.' not found in document.
compliance_issues.context: The mandatory Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland. disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'If the fund is licensed for sale in Switzerland, the representative there is ACOLIN Fund Services AG...'
compliance_issues.rule_reference: Rule - Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland. Disclaimer

compliance_issues.message: Warning about 'Risk of Capital Loss' (Risque de perte en capital) is missing. It is mandatory on Slide 2.
compliance_issues.context: No capital loss warning found in disclaimers or risk factors section
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add warning on Slide 2 Risk Factors: 'Capital is not guaranteed and you may not get back the amount you invested'

compliance_issues.location: Slide 4 - Performance table footer or disclaimer section
compliance_issues.message: Warning that 'Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results' is missing.
compliance_issues.context: Performance data shown on Slide 4 without past performance disclaimer
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add disclaimer below performance table on Slide 4: 'Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results. The value of the investment may fall as well as rise'

compliance_issues.message: Performance data should not be displayed on the cover page (Slide 1). It must not be the main focus.
compliance_issues.context: Performance metrics/chart found on cover page. Main focus should be fund name, date, and key disclosures.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Move performance section to slides 4-5 after risk disclosure and fund characteristics

compliance_issues.location: Slide 4 - Performance table or chart, benchmark row/line missing
compliance_issues.message: Performance is shown but no benchmark comparison detected. Performance must be compared to the official benchmark on the same slide.
compliance_issues.context: Fund performance table exists but benchmark/index row missing. Investors need performance context.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add benchmark comparison on Slide 4 (typically as second row in table or second line in chart) with official index name and performance.

compliance_issues.location: Slide 4 - Performance table header or footnote
compliance_issues.message: Performance shown to retail clients must be net of fees. No indication of 'Net' performance found.
compliance_issues.context: Performance table for retail investor shows returns without 'Net of fees' label. Retail must see realistic net returns.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add 'Net' label to performance table header on Slide 4 or add footnote: '* Performance shown net of fund management fees'

compliance_issues.location: Slide 6 - Fund Characteristics table, NAV row
compliance_issues.message: NAV is mentioned but not labeled as 'indicative' or with a disclaimer stating it is for indicative purposes only (Germany rule).
compliance_issues.suggestion: Ensure NAV is labeled as 'indicative' or add disclaimer: 'The Net Asset Value is provided for indicative purposes only.'

compliance_issues.message: Document targets Germany but seems to miss the specific German disclaimer regarding rebates/inducements.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add the standard German disclaimer to Slide 6 regarding management fee rebates and inducements.

compliance_issues.message: Retail document requires a Glossary. It should typically be on the last slide.
compliance_issues.context: No glossary found in document. Retail clients need term definitions.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add a glossary section explaining technical terms (e.g., SRI, ISIN, prospectus) used in the document

compliance_issues.location: Slide 1 - Cover Page Header or Subtitle
compliance_issues.message: Cover page must include the mention 'Document promotionnel' or 'Marketing communication'.
compliance_issues.context: Regulatory requirement to disclose promotional nature of marketing documents
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add to cover page header or subtitle: 'This is a Marketing Communication / Document Promotionnel'

compliance_issues.message: Target audience (Professional/Retail) must be indicated on the cover page.
compliance_issues.context: Document audience must be clearly identified to ensure proper distribution
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add target audience to Slide 1 (e.g., '*** STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL - FOR PROFESSIONAL CLIENTS ONLY ***')

compliance_issues.location: Slide 2 - Risk Profile / Key Information box
compliance_issues.message: Investment Horizon is missing. It is required on Slide 2.
compliance_issues.context: No investment horizon/recommended holding period found. Required for investor suitability.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add recommended holding period to Slide 2 Key Info (e.g., 'Recommended investment horizon: 5+ years')

compliance_issues.message: Management team mentioned, but disclaimer 'The team is subject to change' is missing.
compliance_issues.context: When team members are named/identified, disclaimer required to protect against liability if personnel changes occur
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add disclaimer in footer or appendix: 'The management team is subject to change. Changes will be communicated to investors.'

compliance_issues.message: Opinions/Forecasts detected but 'not contractually liable' validation disclaimer is missing.
compliance_issues.context: Opinions and forecasts require liability attenuation to limit company exposure and manage investor expectations
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add to disclaimers: 'Opinions expressed... are subject to change without notice. [Company] shall not be held contractually liable for any statement in this document.'

compliance_issues.location: Slide 4 - Simulation chart footer or callout box
compliance_issues.message: Future performance simulation shown but required disclaimer is missing. Simulations must include a disclaimer stating they do not constitute a forecast.
compliance_issues.context: Forward-looking simulation/projection detected without proper disclaimer explaining non-forecast nature and uncertainty
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add disclaimer near simulation graphic on Slide 4: 'The simulation presented does not constitute a forecast of future performance. The value may fall as well as rise. Past performance and simulations are not reliable indicators of future results.'

compliance_issues.message: Disclaimer text contrast ratio 4.00:1 below WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1
compliance_issues.context:
Text: 'Main Risks ...'
Text color: RGB(255, 0, 0)
Background color: RGB(255, 255, 255)
Current ratio: 4.00:1
compliance_issues.suggestion: Increase contrast to at least 4.5:1. Darken text or lighten background. For readability, use dark text (RGB 0,0,0) on light background (RGB 255,255,255) = 21:1 contrast

compliance_issues.message: Disclaimer text contrast ratio 4.00:1 below WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1
compliance_issues.context:
Text: 'Risks...'
Text color: RGB(255, 0, 0)
Background color: RGB(255, 255, 255)
Current ratio: 4.00:1
compliance_issues.suggestion: Increase contrast to at least 4.5:1. Darken text or lighten background. For readability, use dark text (RGB 0,0,0) on light background (RGB 255,255,255) = 21:1 contrast

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Performance' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'Past performance is not a reliable indication of future return and is not constant over time...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'ESG Risk' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory ESG Risk disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'The use of ESG criteria may affect the Fund's performance and therefore the Fund's performance may d...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Issuers mentioned' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Issuers mentioned disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'This does not constitute an investment recommandation...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Back-tested performance' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Back-tested performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The figures refer to simulations of past performances.  These simulations are the result of estimate...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Simulations  of  future performance' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Simulations  of  future performance disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The simulation presented does not constitute a forecast of the future performance of your investment...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'YtM/YtW usage' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory YtM/YtW usage disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: '• The Yield to Maturity (YtM) is the estimation at a certain date of the expected rate of return of ...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: '* Source: FWW Fundservices GmbH. Please take note of the information given at: http://fww.de/disclai...'
disclaimer.rule_reference: Rule - Additional information for the use of FWW-Fundstars Disclaimer

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'If ODDO BHF  Asset Management GmbH receives any rebates on the management fee of target funds or oth...'
disclaimer.rule_reference: Rule - Additional information for very specific marketing information produced for the German market Disclaimer

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information for performance  information dedicated to German professional clients' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Additional Information for performance  information dedicated to German professional clients disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 4 - Performance table footer: 'The European Directive 2014/65/EU (the so-called "MiFID II Directive") extends the scope of provisio...'

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'Although ODDO BHF Asset Management and its information providers, including without limitation, MSCI...'
disclaimer.rule_reference: Rule - Additional Information if MSCI ESG information will be used Disclaimer

disclaimer.message: Required disclaimer 'Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland.' not found in document.
disclaimer.context: The mandatory Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland. disclosure is missing from the document content. This is a regulatory requirement.
disclaimer.suggestion: Add the following text to Slide 2 - Standard Disclaimer section: 'If the fund is licensed for sale in Switzerland, the representative there is ACOLIN Fund Services AG...'
disclaimer.rule_reference: Rule - Additional Information for German domiciled (former FT) mutual fund, that are registrered and distributed in Switzerland. Disclaimer

disclaimer.message: Warning about 'Risk of Capital Loss' (Risque de perte en capital) is missing. It is mandatory on Slide 2.
disclaimer.context: No capital loss warning found in disclaimers or risk factors section
disclaimer.suggestion: Add warning on Slide 2 Risk Factors: 'Capital is not guaranteed and you may not get back the amount you invested'

disclaimer.message: Management team mentioned, but disclaimer 'The team is subject to change' is missing.
disclaimer.context: When team members are named/identified, disclaimer required to protect against liability if personnel changes occur
disclaimer.suggestion: Add disclaimer in footer or appendix: 'The management team is subject to change. Changes will be communicated to investors.'

performance.message: Performance data should not be displayed on the cover page (Slide 1). It must not be the main focus.
performance.context: Performance metrics/chart found on cover page. Main focus should be fund name, date, and key disclosures.
performance.suggestion: Move performance section to slides 4-5 after risk disclosure and fund characteristics

performance.location: Slide 4 - Performance table or chart, benchmark row/line missing
performance.message: Performance is shown but no benchmark comparison detected. Performance must be compared to the official benchmark on the same slide.
performance.context: Fund performance table exists but benchmark/index row missing. Investors need performance context.
performance.suggestion: Add benchmark comparison on Slide 4 (typically as second row in table or second line in chart) with official index name and performance.

performance.location: Slide 4 - Performance table header or footnote
performance.message: Performance shown to retail clients must be net of fees. No indication of 'Net' performance found.
performance.context: Performance table for retail investor shows returns without 'Net of fees' label. Retail must see realistic net returns.
performance.suggestion: Add 'Net' label to performance table header on Slide 4 or add footnote: '* Performance shown net of fund management fees'

performance.location: Slide 4 - Simulation chart footer or callout box
performance.message: Future performance simulation shown but required disclaimer is missing. Simulations must include a disclaimer stating they do not constitute a forecast.
performance.context: Forward-looking simulation/projection detected without proper disclaimer explaining non-forecast nature and uncertainty
performance.suggestion: Add disclaimer near simulation graphic on Slide 4: 'The simulation presented does not constitute a forecast of future performance. The value may fall as well as rise. Past performance and simulations are not reliable indicators of future results.'

compliance.location: Slide 6 - Fund Characteristics table, NAV row
compliance.message: NAV is mentioned but not labeled as 'indicative' or with a disclaimer stating it is for indicative purposes only (Germany rule).
compliance.suggestion: Ensure NAV is labeled as 'indicative' or add disclaimer: 'The Net Asset Value is provided for indicative purposes only.'

compliance.message: Opinions/Forecasts detected but 'not contractually liable' validation disclaimer is missing.
compliance.context: Opinions and forecasts require liability attenuation to limit company exposure and manage investor expectations
compliance.suggestion: Add to disclaimers: 'Opinions expressed... are subject to change without notice. [Company] shall not be held contractually liable for any statement in this document.'

compliance.message: Disclaimer text contrast ratio 4.00:1 below WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1
compliance.context:
Text: 'Main Risks ...'
Text color: RGB(255, 0, 0)
Background color: RGB(255, 255, 255)
Current ratio: 4.00:1
compliance.suggestion: Increase contrast to at least 4.5:1. Darken text or lighten background. For readability, use dark text (RGB 0,0,0) on light background (RGB 255,255,255) = 21:1 contrast

compliance.message: Disclaimer text contrast ratio 4.00:1 below WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1
compliance.context:
Text: 'Risks...'
Text color: RGB(255, 0, 0)
Background color: RGB(255, 255, 255)
Current ratio: 4.00:1
compliance.suggestion: Increase contrast to at least 4.5:1. Darken text or lighten background. For readability, use dark text (RGB 0,0,0) on light background (RGB 255,255,255) = 21:1 contrast

structure.message: Retail document requires a Glossary. It should typically be on the last slide.
structure.context: No glossary found in document. Retail clients need term definitions.
structure.suggestion: Add a glossary section explaining technical terms (e.g., SRI, ISIN, prospectus) used in the document

structure.location: Slide 1 - Cover Page Header or Subtitle
structure.message: Cover page must include the mention 'Document promotionnel' or 'Marketing communication'.
structure.context: Regulatory requirement to disclose promotional nature of marketing documents
structure.suggestion: Add to cover page header or subtitle: 'This is a Marketing Communication / Document Promotionnel'

structure.message: Target audience (Professional/Retail) must be indicated on the cover page.
structure.context: Document audience must be clearly identified to ensure proper distribution
structure.suggestion: Add target audience to Slide 1 (e.g., '*** STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL - FOR PROFESSIONAL CLIENTS ONLY ***')

structure.location: Slide 2 - Risk Profile / Key Information section
structure.message: Risk Scale (SRI) is missing. It is mandatory on Slide 2.
structure.context: No SRI (Synthetic Risk Indicator) found. Essential for investor risk awareness.
structure.suggestion: Add SRI scale graphic on Slide 2 Risk section (typically 1-7 scale with fund position marked)
